parameters.content:
## YouTube Content Recycler — Weekly Auto-Pipeline — WayinVideo Summarization + AI Clipping + GPT-4o-mini + Drive + Sheets

For content creators, social media managers, and agencies who have a library of old YouTube videos and want to automatically repurpose them into short-form content every week. Every Monday at 9AM this workflow reads pending video URLs from your Google Sheet, runs each through two WayinVideo APIs sequentially — first Summarization for structured highlights and tags, then AI Clipping for the top 3 viral clips with 9:16 reframe and animated captions — then uses GPT-4o-mini to write platform-specific captions for TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn. Each clip is downloaded from WayinVideo and uploaded to Google Drive before the export link expires. All captions and Drive links are saved to a Content Calendar sheet. The Video List row is marked as Processed.

## How it works
- **1. Schedule — Every Monday 9AM** triggers the pipeline automatically each week
- **2. Google Sheets — Read Pending Videos** reads all rows from the Video List tab
- **3–6. WayinVideo Summarization** submits the URL, waits 90 seconds, polls until SUCCEEDED, extracts summary, highlights, and tags
- **7–8. Summary Retry Loop** retries every 30 seconds if not ready
- **8. Code — Store Summary Data** saves summary data and passes the video URL forward
- **9–12. WayinVideo AI Clipping** submits the same URL for AI clipping with 9:16 reframe, animated captions, 30–60 second clips, HD 720, limit 3
- **12–13. Clips Retry Loop** retries every 30 seconds if clips not ready
- **14. Code — Extract Clips Array** splits the clips into one item per clip with timestamps and export link
- **15. AI Agent — Write Platform Captions** uses GPT-4o-mini to write TikTok (max 150 chars), Facebook (100–200 words), and LinkedIn (150–250 words) captions
- **17. Code — Parse Caption Output** extracts all 4 caption sections via regex
- **18. HTTP — Download Clip File** downloads the .mp4 before the WayinVideo export link expires
- **19. Google Drive — Upload Clip** uploads each clip to your Drive folder with structured filename
- **20. Google Sheets — Save to Content Calendar** appends 16 columns including Drive link and all captions
- **21. Google Sheets — Mark Video as Processed** updates the Video List row with Processed status

## Set up steps
1. In **3**, **5**, **9**, and **11** — replace YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY
2. In **16. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **2** and **21** — connect Google Sheets OAuth2 and replace YOUR_VIDEO_LIST_SHEET_ID
4. In **20** — connect Google Sheets OAuth2 and replace YOUR_CONTENT_CALENDAR_SHEET_ID
5. In **19** — connect Google Drive OAuth2 and replace YOUR_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID
6. Create Video List sheet tab with columns: Video URL, Video Title, Niche / Category, Status, Last Processed Date
7. Create Content Calendar sheet tab with columns: Video URL, Video Title, Niche, Video Summary, Clip Number, Clip Title, Clip Score, Clip Timestamp, WayinVideo Export Link, Google Drive Link, TikTok Caption, Facebook Caption, LinkedIn Caption, Hashtags, Processed On, Status

## Schedule and Sheet Read
Triggers every Monday at 9AM. Reads all unprocessed video URLs from the Video List tab in Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Section — WayinVideo Summarization Submit, Poll, and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo Summarization — Submit, Poll, and Retry Loop
Submits the video URL to the Summarization API. Waits 90 seconds. Polls until SUCCEEDED. Retries every 30 seconds. Extracts summary text, highlights joined with pipe separator, and comma-separated tags.

nodes.name: Section — WayinVideo AI Clipping Submit, Poll, and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo AI Clipping — Submit, Poll, and Retry Loop
Submits the same video URL to the AI Clipping API — 30–60 second clips, 9:16 reframe, animated captions, HD 720, limit 3. Waits 90 seconds. Polls until SUCCEEDED. Retries every 30 seconds.

nodes.name: Section — Clip Extraction and AI Platform Caption Writing

parameters.content:
## Clip Extraction and AI Platform Caption Writing
Splits clips into one item each. GPT-4o-mini writes TikTok (max 150 chars), Facebook (100–200 words), and LinkedIn (150–250 words) captions with platform-specific rules per clip.

nodes.name: Section — Caption Parse, Download, Drive Upload, Calendar Log, and Mark Processed

parameters.content:
## Caption Parse, Download, Drive Upload, Calendar Log, and Mark Processed
Extracts captions via regex. Downloads .mp4 before export link expires. Uploads to Google Drive. Logs 16 fields to Content Calendar. Marks video as Processed in Video List.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert social media content writer who specializes in writing platform-specific captions for short-form video clips.

A video has been automatically clipped from a YouTube video. Your job is to write three different captions — one for TikTok, one for Facebook, and one for LinkedIn — based on the clip information provided.

---

## VIDEO CONTEXT
- Original Video Title: {{ $json.videoTitle }}
- Niche / Category: {{ $json.niche }}
- Video Summary: {{ $json.summary }}
- Key Highlights: {{ $json.highlights }}
- Video Tags: {{ $json.tags }}

## THIS SPECIFIC CLIP
- Clip Title: {{ $json.clipTitle }}
- Clip Description: {{ $json.clipDescription }}
- Viral Score: {{ $json.clipScore }}/100
- Clip Tags: {{ $json.clipTags }}
- Timestamp: {{ $json.timestampStart }} — {{ $json.timestampEnd }}

---

## CAPTION WRITING RULES

### TikTok Caption Rules:
- Max 150 characters — very short and punchy
- Hook in first 3 words — make it scroll-stopping
- Casual, fun, energetic tone
- End with a question or statement that invites comments
- 3-5 hashtags only — trending style

### Facebook Caption Rules:
- 100-200 words — more detailed and storytelling
- Start with a relatable hook or question
- Build context around why this matters
- End with a clear CTA — ask for comments, shares, or opinions
- 3-5 relevant hashtags at the end

### LinkedIn Caption Rules:
- 150-250 words — professional and insightful
- Start with a bold insight or lesson from the clip
- Share 2-3 specific takeaways in short paragraphs
- Sound like a thought leader — not promotional
- End with a question that sparks professional discussion
- 3-5 professional hashtags

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return in this exact structure:

TIKTOK_CAPTION:
[Write TikTok caption here — max 150 chars including hashtags]

FACEBOOK_CAPTION:
[Write Facebook caption here — 100-200 words with hashtags]

LINKEDIN_CAPTION:
[Write LinkedIn caption here — 150-250 words with hashtags]

HASHTAGS:
[List 5-8 universal hashtags that work across all platforms — lowercase]

---

Now write all three captions for this clip:

parameters.name: ={{ $('17. Code — Parse Caption Output').item.json.videoTitle }} — Clip {{ $('17. Code — Parse Caption Output').item.json.clipIndex }} — {{ $('17. Code — Parse Caption Output').item.json.clipTitle }}.mp4
